query:
SELECT 
  lc.id, 
  lc.customerPhone, 
  lc.stamps, 
  lc.totalStampsEarned, 
  lc.couponsEarned, 
  lc.activeCouponId,
  c.code as couponCode
FROM loyaltyCards lc
LEFT JOIN coupons c ON lc.activeCouponId = c.id
WHERE lc.customerPhone LIKE '%88999290000%' OR lc.customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';
